resumption_context: Review APPROVED. Implementation covers original 8-task containerization plan plus 8 new rules (wgs.smk, references.smk) and build_downstream_dbs.py ratified via architecture-addendum. All 22 non-localrule rules have container+log+resources. RED-ML URL deviation documented. 4 new SIFs built (fastx, morales_downstream, red_ml, star). Two TSCC-only checks remain (snakemake lint + dry-run). Next: 5-qa — generate tests from spec, run unit tests, verify structural ACs.
